person.name: CHEN PEIYU
person.tagline: Film production workflows · Immersive systems · Product engineering
person.about: Technical person from Taiwan, working in Beijing. 10+ years across film production and software engineering—focusing on production/post-production tooling, immersive interactive systems, and shipping end-to-end products.

pillars.label: AI Workflow Hub
pillars.title: AI Workflow Hub
pillars.lead: 影視製作與檔案管理解決方案——把製作現場的流程、檔案與工具串成可運作的系統。

pillars.label: Immersive
pillars.title: Immersive Playground
pillars.lead: 線下沉浸式體驗系統——互動、敘事與現場工程的交會。

pillars.label: Apps
pillars.title: Apps
pillars.lead: 產品型 iOS App——從體驗設計到後端與推播，端到端可運行。

pillars.label: Other
pillars.title: Other
pillars.lead: 小工具、Chrome 擴充與實驗——解決具體小問題的快速作品。
